atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports shortness of breath during tennis match.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports sudden shortness of breath approximately six hours after the match.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the breathlessness as severe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports associated lightheadedness and dizziness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes this episode to hot and humid conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has experienced similar episodes after strenuous activity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes this to hot and humid conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been diligent with his heart failure medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been watching his diet, avoiding salty foods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient had a skin cancer removed five months ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no issues with skin cancer removal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient had a cataract surgery approximately three months ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no issues with cataract surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma or chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acute shortness of breath

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses an exacerbation of congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects dietary indiscretion triggered the exacerbation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports elevated blood pressure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports lower extremity edema

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an additional dose of lasix 80 mg orally once daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes carvedilol 25 mg twice daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in one week

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue monitoring his weight

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue monitoring his fluid intake
